definition: 形容人表现得端庄、得体、低调、有分寸，带有一种优雅而克制的风格。在网络语境中，既可以真诚地赞美，也可带讽刺意味。

dialogue.context: 朋友买了新裙子，试穿给你看

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Ooh, let me see! Oh wow, that dress is so demure on you!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thanks! I wanted something that looks polished but not over the top.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Exactly! Very demure, very mindful. You nailed it.

examples.en: Her makeup tutorial was all about looking polished without trying too hard — very demure.
examples.zh: 她的美妆教程讲的是如何不费力就看起来精致——非常端庄得体。

examples.en: He stayed demure during the whole meeting, barely saying a word.
examples.zh: 他在整个会议中都很低调，几乎一言不发。

examples.en: Buying one iced coffee instead of three? Very demure, very mindful.
examples.zh: 只买一杯冰美式而不是三杯？非常克制，非常有分寸。

usage_tips: 这个词在2024年因TikTok博主Jools Lebron的'very demure, very mindful'视频爆火。语气可以真诚也可以讽刺，关键看语境！
